/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/invoice_demo.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/invoice_demo.dir/invoice_demo_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/invoice_demo.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/invoice_demo.dir/MainWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/invoice_demo.dir/backend/InvoiceController.cpp.o -o invoice_demo  ../../src/libSqliteSyncProLib.a /usr/lib64/libQt6Widgets.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libQt6Sql.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libQt6Network.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib64/libQt6Core.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libcrypto.so
